description_long: This sculpture features two life-sized, draped human figures standing side by side on a rectangular stone base. Both figures are depicted in classical attire, with flowing robes that create intricate folds and textures across their bodies. The figure on the left appears more slender and slightly bowed, while the figure on the right is broader and stands more upright, with one arm bent at the elbow. The faces of both figures are partially eroded, but their postures and garments suggest a solemn or contemplative mood. The stone surface is weathered, with visible patina and discoloration, indicating age and exposure. The base is simple and unadorned, serving to elevate and unify the two figures as a single composition.
description: A pair of life-sized, draped human figures in classical robes stand side by side on a rectangular stone base, with weathered surfaces and detailed garment folds.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures in full, with detailed drapery and partially eroded faces visible.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the drapery and the profile of the figures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures and the flowing lines of their robes.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, emphasizing the posture and garment folds of the rightmost figure.
attribute_subject_matter: two draped human figures in classical style
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a plain, rectangular base with no visible outdoor or indoor context, suggesting it may be in a neutral exhibition or museum setting.
